name: ncbi-datasets
description: Search metadata and download genomic data from NCBI Datasets — genomes, taxonomy, annotations.
long_description: Provides Claude with access to NCBI Datasets v2 for querying and downloading genome assemblies, taxonomy records, and associated annotation files (GFF3, GBFF, protein/RNA FASTA). On first use, the required NCBI CLI tools are installed automatically.

ncbi_api_key.title: NCBI API Key
ncbi_api_key.description: Optional NCBI API key. Increases the rate limit from 3 to 10 requests/second. Get one free at https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/account/

ncbi_download_dir.title: Download Directory
ncbi_download_dir.description: Where genome and taxonomy packages will be saved.
